name: PAX 4 Oven Lid
summary: Keep your device performing at its best with the PAX 4 Replacement Oven Lid.
description: Keep your device performing at its best with the PAX 4 Replacement Oven Lid. Designed specifically for the PAX 4 vaporiser, this genuine replacement lid provides a tight, secure seal to ensure efficient heating, consistent vapour production, and optimal airflow. Product information is provided by the manufacturer and trusted industry sources. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
